creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
After commit of ports r475115 'make describe' causes warning messages as following.

yasu@eastasia[2045]% pwd
/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/cvc4
yasu@eastasia[2046]% svnversion
475184
yasu@eastasia[2047]% make PORTSDIR=/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test describe
sh: clang60: not found
make: "/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/Mk/Uses/compiler.mk" line 78: warning: "clang60 --version" returned non-zero status
make: "/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/Mk/Uses/compiler.mk" line 133: warning: "clang++60 -### /dev/null 2>&1" returned non-zero status
cvc4-1.6|/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/cvc4|/usr/local|Automatic theorem prover for SMT (Satisfiability Modulo Theories)
|/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/cvc4/pkg-descr|greg@unrelenting.technology|math java||||/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/antlr3 /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/autoconf /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/automake /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/boost-libs /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/gmake /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/libantlr3c /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/libtool /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/llvm60 /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/pkgconf /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/readline /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/java/openjdk8 /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/lang/python37 /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/cryptominisat /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/gmp /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/shells/bash|/usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/boost-libs /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/libantlr3c /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/devel/readline /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/cryptominisat /usr0/freebsd/ports/head.test/math/gmp|https://cvc4.cs.stanford.edu/web/

D    files/patch-config_cryptominisat.m4
